goal: Export just the fixture subtree as a self-contained mm-unit USD for the vendor.
thoughts: Scope export to /World/Fixture subtree only -- robot must not leak in. Flatten/vendor external references so it opens without Nucleus. Preserve metersPerUnit=0.001 so vendor sees mm. Round-trip verify by opening the exported file.
code:
prims = list_all_prims(path_prefix="/World/Fixture")
export_scene_package(
    output_path="<OUT_DIR>/fixture_for_vendor.usdz",
    scope_paths=["/World/Fixture"],
    flatten_references=True,
    vendor_nucleus_assets=True,
    preserve_metersPerUnit=True,
    include_subtree=True
)
# Alternative flat usd:
export_stage(
    output_path="<OUT_DIR>/fixture_for_vendor.usd",
    root_prim="/World/Fixture",
    flatten=True
)
# Verify:
verify = open_stage(path="<OUT_DIR>/fixture_for_vendor.usd", read_only=True)
# Confirm metersPerUnit=0.001 and robot prims absent
failure_modes: Exporting whole stage including robot when only fixture requested
Leaving Nucleus references intact so vendor can't open the file
Losing mm units through export with no metersPerUnit preserved
